goals: Calculate average speed and lap time for a racing scenario
Convert speed units between metric and imperial systems for international racing standards
Look up physics formulas related to motion and velocity used in racing
Practice math problems involving speed, distance, and time calculations

user_agent_config.personality: Eager learner focused on improving racing performance through technical understanding. Enthusiastic about data and numbers related to speed and timing.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows basic arithmetic and has practical racing experience but lacks formal math knowledge about physics calculations, unit conversions, and racing dynamics. Does not know internal tool names.

end_condition: The user has completed calculations for their racing scenario, converted relevant units, reviewed applicable physics formulas, and practiced related math problems to improve their racing analysis skills.
